sections.paragraph: only in pl. Isa 5:2, , bad grapes, sour and unripe, labruscœ, as rightly rendered by Jerome, Jarchi, lambrusques. Kimchi, ענבים נבאשׁים, Saad. ענבים רעים. Aqu. σαπριαί. Symm. ἀτελῆ. The same use of the word is found in Mishnah Maaseroth i. § 2, where for אבשים, we should read באשים, as may be seen from the MSS. Gloss of Tanchum of Jerusalem. I have treated on this more at large in Comment. on Isa. i. p. 230; ii. p. 364, and I have shewn that the opinion commonly received among moderns, by which they understand the aconite, rests on a mere error of Ol. Celsius (Hierobot. ii. p. 199).
